description: DirectCallee (compiler2/body.rs:71) is a one-variant enum: { Function(FunctionId) }. The enum existed to host the deleted Named variant (removed in c7d21d580); its reason died with its sibling. Replace DirectCallee with FunctionId at LoweredTail::DirectCall.callee and every consumer (body lowering, semantic walk's resolve_direct_call, artifact planning, native lowering, tests). Pure melt: no behavior change, fewer wrappers, one less match at every callsite consumer. Verify by compiler2:: staying green (hard gate, 735) and full-suite name-set delta empty.
title: Compiler2 body tier: melt the single-variant DirectCallee enum to a bare FunctionId
